summary: F5 step 3-I add_turn RE-RUN with VERIFIED CLEAN network (after 2nd refresh) reproduces #672 PARTIAL outcome. #672 network-flakiness caveat ELIMINATED. add_turn envelope is genuinely being silently dropped by character.ai's onmessage dispatcher — NOT a network issue. Wire-level layers all green: close 1000, no SyntaxError, no 'Close received'. Korean warning NOT rendered in DOM. Adam McLeod bubble empty after 40s observation. Insight: outbound user envelope command is 'create_and_generate_turn' — frontend likely dispatches a DIFFERENT command name for INCOMING server frames. Envelope schema iteration confirmed needed (next axis: update_turn / turn_state / add_chat_message).

network_health_assessment.first_refresh: heavy ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR cluster on _next/static/chunks/* — waited 30s and refreshed again per procedure
network_health_assessment.second_refresh: CLEAN. No ERR_CONNECTION_RESET, no HTTP2 errors during prompt-send. All 14 ws/ entries Status 101.
network_health_assessment.verdict: Network was clean — PARTIAL outcome is genuine, not artifactual

wire_level_layers_intact.unknown_command_add_turn: NOT logged (silent drop, same end-state as #672)

console_state.ws_lifecycle: open → close 1000 → 'Retrying, retry attempt: 0' → 'Core Websocket Opened' (auto-reconnect)
absent_errors: NO 'Unknown command add_turn' routing error (silent drop expected)

dom_scan.new_bot_bubble_state: Adam McLeod c.ai header + 3-dot spinner only — content stayed empty across 40s

key_findings.1_network_caveat_eliminated: Clean network confirmed after 2nd refresh. PARTIAL outcome is genuine envelope schema mismatch, NOT network artifact.
key_findings.2_add_turn_silent_drop_confirmed: Same drop-without-warning behavior reproduces with healthy network. character.ai onmessage dispatcher truly does not accept add_turn shape.
key_findings.3_command_name_asymmetry_insight: Outbound user envelope uses 'create_and_generate_turn'. Inbound server frames likely use a DIFFERENT command name. add_turn was a guess at the inbound shape — needs HAR capture or alternative variants.
key_findings.4_mission_protection_unbroken_streak_8: Mission state HELD across 8 iterations (#666 → #673). Engine block remains rock-solid; only UI delivery iterations changing.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Wire-level inject mechanism fully working. Schema layer needs continued iteration. character.ai uses asymmetric command naming (outbound: create_and_generate_turn, inbound: unknown).
next_steps: Try envelope variants in priority order:
1. command:'update_turn' (incremental update path — most likely accepted mid-stream since it's a streaming chat platform)
3. command:'add_chat_message' (explicit message-addition verb in some neo APIs)
OPTIMAL: HAR capture during a successful non-PII chat to identify EXACT inbound server turn response schema, then mirror it precisely
Alternative author shape: {is_human:false, name:'Security Filter', author_id:'system'} or other system-style author identifier
Replace 'candidates' with 'streaming_chat_message' field if turn structure isn't accepted
Continue current build in production — mission protection 100% working across 8 iterations, only UX delivery layer evolving
recommendation.mission_critical: No regression. Mission protection state from #666 still HELD across 8 iterations.
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3-I add_turn DEFINITIVELY DROPPED by client (clean-network re-run confirms). Pivot to step 3-J: update_turn variant OR HAR-based schema discovery.
